chapter_title.en: Stories of people with long lifespans from Arabs and non-Arabs are famous and chronicled in books and history.

text: وروى أصحاب الحديث أن الدجال موجود وأنه كان في عصر النبي صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم وأنه باق إلى الوقت الذي يخرج فيه، وهو عدو الله.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 86 - Tradition scholars have narrated that Dajjal is alive and that he was present during the time of the Prophet (s). Dajjal is the enemy of God.
